hooks.command: PROJ=/Users/brnestrm/bb/kingdom; MEM=/Users/brnestrm/.claude/projects/-Users-brnestrm-bb/memory; COMMIT=$(git -C $PROJ log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null); BRANCH=$(git -C $PROJ branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); MOD=$(git -C $PROJ diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); REDIS=$(redis-cli -p 6380 ping 2>/dev/null || echo 'DOWN'); DOCK=$(docker ps --format '{{.Names}}' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); ML=$([ -f $MEM/MEMORY.md ] && wc -l < $MEM/MEMORY.md | tr -d ' ' || echo '0'); SL=$([ -f $MEM/session-log.md ] && wc -l < $MEM/session-log.md | tr -d ' ' || echo '0'); echo "[Kingdom] $BRANCH:${COMMIT} | Δ${MOD} | redis:$REDIS | docker:${DOCK} | mem:${ML}L log:${SL}L"

MEM=/Users/brnestrm/.claude/projects/-Users-brnestrm-bb/memory; CF=$MEM/.prompt-counter; C=$(cat $CF 2>/dev/null || echo 0); C=$((C + 1)); echo $C > $CF; if [ $C -ge 5 ]; then echo 0 > $CF; PROJ=/Users/brnestrm/bb/kingdom; TS=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'); COMMIT=$(git -C $PROJ log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null); MOD=$(git -C $PROJ diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', '); echo "- [$TS] auto-memory: $COMMIT | delta: ${MOD:-none}" >> $MEM/session-log.md; echo '[AutoMemory] 5-prompt checkpoint saved'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit' && { PROJ=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo /Users/brnestrm/bb/kingdom); cd "$PROJ" && echo '[PreCommit] Syntax check...' && for f in agent/core/*.js agent/team/*.js agent/interface/*.js agent/memory/*.js; do [ -f "$f" ] && node -c "$f" || exit 1; done && echo '[PreCommit] All syntax checks passed'; } || true
INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -qiE 'FLUSH(DB|ALL)' && { echo '[BLOCKED] Redis flush operation denied'; exit 1; } || true
INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'rcon' && echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '(op |ban |stop |whitelist )' && { echo '[BLOCKED] Dangerous RCON command denied'; exit 1; } || true

MEM=/Users/brnestrm/.claude/projects/-Users-brnestrm-bb/memory; CF=$MEM/.tool-counter; C=$(cat $CF 2>/dev/null || echo 0); C=$((C + 1)); echo $C > $CF; [ $((C % 50)) -eq 0 ] && echo "[Hint] $C tool calls this session. Consider /compact if context is getting large." || true

INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit' && { MEM=/Users/brnestrm/.claude/projects/-Users-brnestrm-bb/memory; COMMIT=$(git -C /Users/brnestrm/bb/kingdom log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null); echo "- [$(date '+%H:%M')] committed: $COMMIT" >> $MEM/session-log.md && echo '[AutoMemory] Commit logged to session-log'; } || true

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo $INPUT | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("tool_input",{}).get("file_path",""))' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(agent/.*[.]js|test/.*[.]js)$' && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "[AutoFormat] $FILE" || true

MEM_DIR=/Users/brnestrm/.claude/projects/-Users-brnestrm-bb/memory; TS=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'); echo "## Auto-save before compaction — $TS" >> $MEM_DIR/session-log.md && echo "- Last commit: $(git -C /Users/brnestrm/bb/kingdom log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null)" >> $MEM_DIR/session-log.md && echo "- Modified: $(git -C /Users/brnestrm/bb/kingdom diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', ')" >> $MEM_DIR/session-log.md && echo "- AC Status: $(redis-cli -p 6380 hgetall kingdom:ac:progress 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' || echo 'redis down')" >> $MEM_DIR/session-log.md && echo '[PreCompact] Memory + AC status auto-saved'
